name: Redwood Concrete Pump
tagline: Sonoma County's longest-running concrete pumping company
seoDescription: Redwood Concrete Pump is a family-owned, ACPA-certified concrete pumping company serving Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino Counties since 1981. Schwing line pumps for residential, commercial, and long-distance pours.

contact.address: 1372 Los Alamos Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409

images.heroAlt: The Worden family beside a Redwood Concrete Pump Schwing line pump in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Concrete placed clean, on time, every pour
sections.subheading: Three generations of the Worden family running Schwing line pumps across Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino Counties — the oldest standing concrete pumping service in Sonoma County.

image.alt: Corey and Nichole Worden beside a Redwood Concrete Pump rig

sections.heading: Built to make your pour the easy part of the day
sections.intro: We show up early, set up clean, and run state-of-the-art Schwing equipment so your crew can stay on schedule.

items.title: Oldest pump in the county
items.body: Established in 1981 — 45+ years placing concrete across the North Bay, through every market and every kind of jobsite.

items.title: Early, clean, and dialed in
items.body: Our operators routinely arrive ahead of the truck to assess the site, set up, and keep the whole operation moving smoothly.

items.title: Schwing SP 500 line pumps
items.body: High-pressure Schwing line pumps on Ford F-450 flatbeds, run by ACPA-certified operators who handle tricky mix designs.

items.title: Reach where trucks can't
items.body: Long-distance placement past 1,000 feet, hillside and basement pours, and interior work — concrete where the chute won't go.

sections.heading: Residential, commercial, and specialty placement
sections.intro: From a backyard ADU slab to a thousand-foot hillside push, we place concrete for every phase of the job.

items.title: Residential pours
items.description: Home and ADU foundations, driveways, patios, pool decks, walkways, retaining walls, decorative hardscapes, solar piers, and fence-post concrete.

image.alt: Redwood Concrete Pump fleet staged for a residential pour

items.title: Commercial & public works
items.description: Slab on grade, drilled-pier foundations, tilt-up walls, post-tension slabs, ICF grouting, sidewalks, ADA ramps, and public-works infrastructure.

image.alt: Redwood Concrete Pump crew placing a public-works sidewalk and ADA ramp

items.title: Specialty & long-distance
items.description: Long-distance pumping past 1,000 feet, well abatements and sanitary seals, void filling, lightweight multi-story pumping, utility duct banks, and sports courts.

image.alt: Schwing pump placing concrete at a Sonoma County vineyard

sections.heading: A North Bay family business since 1981
body: In 1981, Eric and Vickie Worden started Redwood Concrete Pump with a single old pump — Vickie running the office, Eric running the field. More than forty years later, through the 2008 recession and the pandemic, the company is still here and still family-run.

Today the Wordens' adult children, Nichole and Corey, run operations alongside their parents, making Redwood the oldest standing concrete pumping service in Sonoma County. The values haven't changed: do right by the customer, find a way when a pour looks impossible, and do things the right way the first time.

image.alt: A branded Redwood Concrete Pump truck and Schwing pump at a Sonoma County jobsite

items.quote: Redwood showed up a full hour early to assess the situation and set up for the pour. Their pump guy was efficient, clean and patient. The whole operation went very smoothly.
items.author: Daniel Sereni

items.quote: Their rates are reasonable and worth the exceptional service.
items.author: Rod A.

sections.heading: Three generations, one promise: do it right the first time
sections.subheading: Eric and Vickie Worden started Redwood Concrete Pump in 1981. Their children, Nichole and Corey, run it today — still the oldest standing concrete pumping service in Sonoma County.

sections.heading: Started with one old pump
body: In 1981, Eric and Vickie Worden started Redwood Concrete Pump with a single old pump — Vickie running the office, Eric running the field. More than forty years later, through the 2008 recession and the pandemic, the company is still here and still family-run.

Today the Wordens' adult children, Nichole and Corey, run operations alongside their parents, making Redwood the oldest standing concrete pumping service in Sonoma County. The mission has stayed the same: provide superior concrete pumping across Sonoma, Napa, and Marin Counties so contractors can count on punctual, clean, competitively-priced service without a second thought.
highlights: Integrity — we will never take advantage of a customer
Innovation — if there's a will, there's a way
Work ethic — do things the right way, the first time

image.alt: Nichole and Corey Worden beside a Redwood Concrete Pump rig

sections.blurb: Reach Redwood Concrete Pump at 1372 Los Alamos Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409, call (707) 538-1206, or email redwoodconcretepump@sonic.net. We serve Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino Counties, Monday through Friday.
